title: orchis roxburghii
intro: Orchis roxburghii, also known as the Roxburgh's orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to the Himalayas and surrounding regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Orchis roxburghii include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as providing relief from respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of powder, decoction, or infusion, and can be administered orally or applied topically to skin conditions.
